disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Severe tight, gripping muscular pain and spasm across the chest wall and neck, building over 48 hours and worse tonight after a prolonged period at work
trigger_question_examples: Where exactly is the pain and how did it start?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's a tight, locked-up, gripping pain across my chest and up into my neck and shoulders. It's been building for a couple of days and tonight it's the worst it's ever been.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Patient's own blood pressure reading tonight was very high (178/102) and heart felt like it was racing
trigger_question_examples: Have you been able to check your blood pressure?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I checked my blood pressure at home and it was 178 over 102, and my heart feels like it's pounding and racing.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: The pain feels worse when the patient moves, tenses, or presses on the area, and eases nothing when resting the muscles
trigger_question_examples: Does anything make the pain better or worse — movement, pressing on it, breathing?
If you press on the sore spots, does it reproduce the pain?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yeah, if I move or tense up it's worse, and pressing on the muscles definitely makes it hurt more. It feels like it's in the muscles.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No pain radiating to the jaw or arm, no cold sweat, no nausea, no crushing central pressure independent of the muscle pain
trigger_question_examples: Does the pain spread to your arm, jaw or back?
Any sweating, nausea, or a crushing pressure separate from the muscle pain?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, it's not spreading to my arm or jaw, and I'm not sweating or feeling sick. It just feels like tight muscles.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No sudden severe headache, no visual disturbance, no weakness or numbness on one side, no difficulty speaking
trigger_question_examples: Any sudden severe headache, changes in your vision, weakness on one side, or trouble speaking?
Have you had any numbness, slurred speech, or a headache that came on suddenly and severely?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No headache like that, my vision is fine, and I'm not weak or having trouble talking. It's just this pain and being wired.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Profound exhaustion, badly disrupted sleep, a racing/wired feeling, and long-standing feeling of being on guard and unsafe
trigger_question_examples: How has your sleep and energy been?
How have you been feeling in yourself lately?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I'm completely wiped out and I can barely sleep. I feel wired and on edge all the time, like I can never really relax or feel safe.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Years of accumulated stress from discrimination and feeling like an outsider, with a recent prolonged period in a workplace where the patient felt unsafe and hypervigilant
trigger_question_examples: Has anything been going on in your life or work that's been weighing on you?
You mentioned not feeling safe — can you tell me more about that?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Honestly, it's years of being treated as an outsider and dealing with discrimination, especially at work. I've just come off a long stretch where I felt I didn't belong and had to have my guard up constantly.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Categorical refusal to attend the Emergency Department because of deep mistrust of healthcare institutions and fear of not being believed
trigger_question_examples: Would you be willing to go to the emergency department or have an ambulance come?
What would help you feel safe getting checked over tonight?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I'm not going to the emergency department. I don't trust them to treat me fairly and I don't have the energy to fight to be believed tonight. I need another way to get checked.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No prior diagnosis of heart disease and not taking any prescribed blood-pressure medication; only over-the-counter anti-inflammatories, which gave no relief
trigger_question_examples: Do you have any heart or blood-pressure problems, and are you on any regular medication?
Have you ever been diagnosed with a heart condition or told your blood pressure was high before?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, I've never been told I have a heart problem and I'm not on any blood-pressure tablets. I just took some over-the-counter anti-inflammatories tonight and they did nothing.
